name: canopy-native-harness
description: Headless proof of the canopy/native walker: runs external/native.js against a mock Fabric and asserts the §8 pass criteria (real native views, single targeted updateProps on tap, no re-mount). Two harnesses: the source walker (mini-runtime) and the real compiler bundle.

scripts.test: node run.js && node run-compiled.js && node run-echo.js && node run-reload.js && node run-reload-seam.js
